mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_follows (follower_id, following_id) VALUES (#{followerId}, #{followingId}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.username, u.display_name, u.email, u.avatar_url, u.bio, u.follower_count, u.following_count, u.created_at, EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM user_follows uf2 WHERE uf2.follower_id = #{currentUserId} AND uf2.following_id = u.id ) AS followed_by_current_user FROM users u INNER JOIN user_follows uf ON uf.following_id = u.id WHERE uf.follower_id = #{userId} ORDER BY uf.created_at DESC
